/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/scratch_nested-subdir_scratch-nested-subdir-executable.dir/scratch-nested-subdir-executable.cc.o" -o /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/scratch/nested-subdir/ns3-dev-scratch-nested-subdir-executable-default   -L/Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libscratch-nested-subdir-lib.a /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-core-default.dylib
